human_actions_pending.context: Real root cause was stale credits data (actor not actually in movie). Fix shipped in b005132. Needs live test.

decisions.decision: Add filmography_fetched boolean to Actor table (migration 0009)
decisions.rationale: Short-circuit in _ensure_actor_credits_in_db fired on any credit row (even 1 from movie cast fetch), preventing Drew Barrymore-style actors from getting their filmography fetched

decisions.decision: Sort low-rated bucket (vote_count < 500) by vote_average, not DB order
decisions.rationale: DB query has no ORDER BY, so unrated bucket was non-deterministic causing apparent sort instability on page 1
CSS sticky positioning not working correctly on mobile — user confirmed prior state was fine

next_action: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 9 for Navigation Redesign. Run /clear first.
context_notes: Phase 08 complete. All bugs fixed. Multiple post-execution hotfixes applied this session. MPAA backfill was silently broken by missing logger — now fixed. Docker CI in place but needs secrets configured. Context exhausted at ~91%.
